title: Chapter 5
text: PLAYLIST The Death of Peace of Mind – Bad Omens Karma Police – Radiohead Therapy – VOILA Drinking with Cupid – VOILA Bad Habits – Ed Sheeran & Bring Me The Horizon A Way to Restart – Colours in the Street In Circles – Holding Absence Same Team – Alice Merton All the King’s Men – The Rigs Empty – Letdown Half the World – Arcane Roots Beyond Today – James Gilespie You can find the complete playlist on Spotify .
